goal: Turn a user request into a validated deliverable

steps.name: intake

fixture_input.user_request: I need a simple web scraper in Python.

steps.expected_output_summary: A clear, structured specification for a Python web scraper.

steps.name: complete

fixture_input.normalized_request: Scraper spec: URL https://example.com, extract titles, use BeautifulSoup.

steps.expected_output_summary: A working Python script that scrapes titles from example.com.
